story.title: Show HN: Bento - An entire PowerPoint in one HTML file (edit+view+data+collab)

draft:
I just came across Bento, a tool that puts an entire PowerPoint in one HTML file. 
This means I can edit, view, and collaborate on presentations all in one place. 
Key benefits include simplified workflows and version control. 
Will tools like Bento change how I work with presentations?
#Bento #HTMLpresentations #collaborationtools
